body.notes:
Discovered 2026-04-19 while investigating T-llm-tool-dispatch-as-codeblock. _MAX_CHARS=4800 in wild_igor/igor/cognition/system_prompt.py:35 truncates the interactive-role prompt right after the DB-loaded CORE_PATTERN + IDENTITY + PROCEDURAL dump. ALL of the static layers — TOOL DISPATCH (D222), RESPONSE FORMAT, CLOUD ROLE, TREE-BUILDING DIRECTIVE, ORIENTATION, CRITICAL OPERATIONAL NOTES — live at lines 166-273 and get chopped before reaching the LLM. Verified by dumping build_system_prompt(cortex, role='interactive') and searching: 'TOOL DISPATCH' not in output, 'ANTI-PATTERN' not in output, 'RUNS NOTHING' not in output. Last 1200 chars end at '[... additional memories trimmed ...]' with CP1-CP6 as the tail.

## Why this matters
Every 'Igor doesn't follow a directive we wrote in the system prompt' bug may root here. The operational rules we think are live aren't. Examples:
- T-llm-tool-dispatch-as-codeblock (Igor emits store_memory in code fences)
- Bare acknowledgment filter (REPLY DISCIPLINE only lives in _fallback_prompt, not the interactive one)
- Arbiter-queue discipline ("Irreversible actions go to arbiter queue") — in the truncated section

## Fix options (pick one)
1. **Reorder layers**: put static directives FIRST, DB dump LAST. Truncation then hits the DB content, which is already paginated via _IDENTITY_LIMIT / _PROCEDURAL_LIMIT. Cleanest.
2. **Budget enforcement**: compute how much static takes, subtract from 4800, pass remainder as the DB caps. Same spirit as G57 was meant to do.
3. **Bump _MAX_CHARS**: only if the downstream LLM context window has room. Check openrouter_reasoner + ollama_reasoner callers.

## Scope
Touches wild_igor/igor/cognition/system_prompt.py (MEDIUM inertia). Needs Akien review before edit. Follow-up on T-llm-tool-dispatch-as-codeblock is blocked until this lands — no point strengthening prompt directives that never reach the model.

## Provenance
Akien-Claude 2026-04-19 autonomous sprint. Attempted to strengthen tool-dispatch directive, observed the addition didn't reach output, traced to _MAX_CHARS truncation.
body.title: Interactive system prompt truncation eats all static layers (tool dispatch, safety notes, orientation)
body.result: Mis-scoped. The truncation is a symptom of the legacy direct-reasoner inference path (big system_prompt + one-shot call), not the architecture Akien designed. Real fix lives in T-retire-legacy-direct-reasoner-path: migrate remaining interactive turns through the new turn_pipeline + reasoning_workflow + voice_ab path, which already implements peer-conversation to upstream (the biomimetic model Akien described 2026-04-19: trees reason, escalate to LLM conversationally when reasoning fails, return to trees for output phrasing). Closing as superseded.
